user_reported_defect: delivery-seam-review.html was clipped at the bottom in the live web view
root_cause: Desktop document sheets used a fixed 11-inch height with overflow hidden while footers were absolutely positioned inside the same canvas. Content taller than the sheet was discarded, and narrow screens inherited footer collisions and tablet-width overflow.

confirmed_defects: Delivery Seam Review clipped on desktop, laptop, and tablet
Document footers overlapped content on narrow screens
Fixed-width document pages overflowed the 768px tablet viewport
Resume, cover letter, and 90-day plan lacked a semantic H1

strategy: Allow screen document sheets to grow with content while retaining fixed US Letter print rules
Return footers to normal flow at tablet and mobile widths
Use document-scale worksheet headings instead of site-scale marketing H2 headings
Add semantic H1 structure to the resume, cover letter, and 90-day plan

manual_visual_review.delivery_seam_review_desktop: passed; complete Closeout Harvest section, candidate thesis, and footer are visible
manual_visual_review.delivery_seam_review_tablet: passed; no horizontal overflow or bottom clipping
manual_visual_review.delivery_seam_review_mobile: passed; all fields, tables, checklists, thesis, and footer remain visible
manual_visual_review.resume_tablet: passed; both pages remain fully composed without viewport overflow
manual_visual_review.cover_letter_mobile: passed; signature and footer no longer collide
manual_visual_review.90_day_plan_mobile: passed; both page sections and footers remain visible
manual_visual_review.interview_brief_mobile: passed; all five page surfaces remain complete
manual_visual_review.generated_pdfs: passed; required page counts retained and rendered pages show no clipping

environment_note: The preferred browser plugin was unavailable, so the audit used standard Playwright Chromium in GitHub Actions, with full-page screenshots and PDF rasterization retained in the workflow artifacts.
